intro: Eremogone otitoides, also known as Alpine Sandwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Eremogone otitoides include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
